---
title: "Leaf Angle and Water Availability"
description: "Analyzing leaf angle and  water potential in drought conditions from two California oak species"
author:
  - name: Steven Le
date: 05-02-2026
categories: [RStudio, Data Visualization, Lab Project]
image: tree-image.jpg
draft: false
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](leaf-image.pdf){width="100%" height="500px"}

------------------------------------------------------------------------
